adjust_white_fabric_edge.query: a worker pinches the edge of a white fabric item on the worktable with both hands and adjusts its position

raise_heat_press_handle.query: a worker lifts the orange-gripped handle of a heat press and opens the upper platen

remove_white_fabric_from_heat_press.query: a worker pulls a white fabric item out from under the open heat press, moves it to the worktable on the right, and spreads it out

separate_white_fabric_from_stack.query: a worker pinches the edge of one white fabric item from the stack on the left, separates it, and lifts it

align_and_fold_white_fabric_on_table.query: a worker places a white fabric item on the center worktable, folds its sides, and aligns the edges with both hands
